requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — GSO / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——GSO / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——GSO / IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs entering Qatar are assessed for safety against GSO standards that adopt IEC 62133 (GSO IEC 62133 / GSO IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems). GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) standards are applied by QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology) under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry. The GSO IEC 62133-2 text mirrors IEC 62133-2 abuse and electrochemical testing: overcharge, external short-circuit, forced discharge, crush/impact, drop, thermal abuse, and altitude/temperature cycling. For lithium battery / power bank products that fall within QGOSM's regulated-product scope, a test report demonstrating conformity to the relevant GSO/IEC 62133 standard is the core technical evidence underpinning conformity assessment and registration. Reports should come from a laboratory acceptable to QGOSM / the conformity-assessment route.
summary.zh: 进入卡塔尔的便携式锂电芯及电池组，须依据采纳IEC 62133的GSO标准（锂体系适用GSO IEC 62133 / GSO IEC 62133-2）进行安全评估。GSO（海合会标准化组织）标准由隶属商业与工业部的QGOSM（卡塔尔标准与计量总局）适用。GSO IEC 62133-2文本对应IEC 62133-2的滥用及电化学测试：过充、外部短路、强制放电、挤压/撞击、跌落、热滥用及高度/温度循环。对于落入QGOSM受监管产品范围的锂电池/移动电源，证明符合相关GSO/IEC 62133标准的测试报告，是支撑合格评定与注册的核心技术证据。报告应来自QGOSM/合格评定路径可接受的实验室。
summary.zht: 進入卡塔爾的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，須依據採納IEC 62133的GSO標準（鋰體系適用GSO IEC 62133 / GSO IEC 62133-2）進行安全評估。GSO（海合會標準化組織）標準由隸屬商業與工業部的QGOSM（卡塔爾標準與計量總局）適用。GSO IEC 62133-2文本對應IEC 62133-2的濫用及電化學測試：過充、外部短路、強制放電、擠壓/撞擊、跌落、熱濫用及高度/溫度循環。對於落入QGOSM受監管產品範圍的鋰電池/行動電源，證明符合相關GSO/IEC 62133標準的測試報告，是支撐合格評定與登記的核心技術證據。報告應來自QGOSM/合格評定路徑可接受的實驗室。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62133-2 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems (GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — base international standard adopted by GSO
QGOSM conformity assessment and product registration framework (Ministry of Commerce and Industry)

summary.en: China's primary safety baseline for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), supplemented by GB 18287 (mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but carries national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Because Qatar applies the GSO adoption of IEC 62133, a Chinese report written purely against GB 31241 is not automatically equivalent: the GSO/IEC 62133 route requires a report demonstrating the IEC 62133 clauses as adopted by GSO, from a laboratory acceptable to the Qatari conformity-assessment pathway. A GB 31241 report can support engineering analysis but is not, on its own, accepted as the GSO/IEC 62133 conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全基线为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），并辅以GB 18287（手机用锂离子电池）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。由于卡塔尔适用GSO对IEC 62133的采纳，纯粹依据GB 31241编写的中国报告不自动等同：GSO/IEC 62133路径要求提供证明符合GSO所采纳IEC 62133条款的报告，且来自卡塔尔合格评定路径可接受的实验室。GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但其本身不被接受为GSO/IEC 62133的合格证据。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全基線為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），並輔以GB 18287（手機用鋰離子電池）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。由於卡塔爾適用GSO對IEC 62133的採納，純粹依據GB 31241編寫的中國報告不自動等同：GSO/IEC 62133路徑要求提供證明符合GSO所採納IEC 62133條款的報告，且來自卡塔爾合格評定路徑可接受的實驗室。GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但其本身不被接受為GSO/IEC 62133的合格證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: The Qatari route asks for safety evidence against the GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2, not against GB 31241. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) the test report must demonstrate the IEC 62133-2 clauses as adopted by GSO, and ideally be issued or accepted under a route recognised by QGOSM, whereas a domestic GB 31241 report follows national deviations; (2) where the lithium battery / power bank is within QGOSM's regulated-product scope, the safety report feeds a formal conformity assessment and registration step (see market-access row) rather than a self-declaration; (3) test sample configuration must match the exact cell/pack being exported. Because GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 share heritage, gap-test or re-test effort is often limited, but the deliverable accepted in Qatar is the GSO/IEC 62133 report, not the GB 31241 report.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔路径要求提供依据GSO采纳的IEC 62133-2的安全证据，而非GB 31241。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）测试报告须证明符合GSO所采纳的IEC 62133-2条款，并最好由QGOSM认可的路径出具或接受，而国内GB 31241报告遵循国家偏差；（2）当锂电池/移动电源落入QGOSM受监管产品范围时，该安全报告进入正式的合格评定与注册环节（见市场准入行），而非自我声明；（3）测试样品配置须与实际出口的电芯/电池组完全一致。由于GB 31241与IEC 62133-2同源，差距测试或重测工作量通常有限，但卡塔尔接受的交付物是GSO/IEC 62133报告，而非GB 31241报告。
gap.zht: 卡塔爾路徑要求提供依據GSO採納的IEC 62133-2的安全證據，而非GB 31241。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）測試報告須證明符合GSO所採納的IEC 62133-2條款，並最好由QGOSM認可的路徑出具或接受，而國內GB 31241報告遵循國家偏差；（2）當鋰電池/行動電源落入QGOSM受監管產品範圍時，該安全報告進入正式的合格評定與登記環節（見市場准入行），而非自我聲明；（3）測試樣品配置須與實際出口的電芯/電池組完全一致。由於GB 31241與IEC 62133-2同源，差距測試或重測工作量通常有限，但卡塔爾接受的交付物是GSO/IEC 62133報告，而非GB 31241報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — products falling within QGOSM's regulated-product scope require safety conformity to the GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2 as the technical basis for conformity assessment and registration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adoption of IEC 62133 lithium battery safety standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Qatar assesses portable lithium cell and pack safety against the GSO adoption of IEC 62133-2, applied by QGOSM. A Chinese GB 31241 report shares technical heritage with IEC 62133-2 but is not automatically accepted as the GSO/IEC 62133 conformity evidence; exporters should obtain a GSO/IEC 62133-2 report from a laboratory acceptable to the Qatari conformity-assessment route, matched to the exact cell/pack configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔依据GSO采纳的IEC 62133-2（由QGOSM适用）评估便携式锂电芯及电池组安全。中国GB 31241报告与IEC 62133-2技术同源，但不自动被接受为GSO/IEC 62133的合格证据；出口商应取得由卡塔尔合格评定路径可接受实验室出具、与实际电芯/电池组配置一致的GSO/IEC 62133-2报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡塔爾依據GSO採納的IEC 62133-2（由QGOSM適用）評估便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全。中國GB 31241報告與IEC 62133-2技術同源，但不自動被接受為GSO/IEC 62133的合格證據；出口商應取得由卡塔爾合格評定路徑可接受實驗室出具、與實際電芯/電池組配置一致的GSO/IEC 62133-2報告。
